title: Ath Magical Number
hints: Use binary search to find the Ath magical number.
For a given number mid, count how many magical numbers are <= mid using inclusion-exclusion principle.
Count of magical numbers <= mid = mid/B + mid/C - mid/LCM(B,C).
Use binary search where lo = 0 and hi = min(B, C) * A as an upper bound.
When count == A, store the answer and continue searching left to find the minimum such number.
Calculate LCM using GCD: LCM(a, b) = (a * b) / GCD(a, b).
Remember to apply modulo 10^9 + 7 to the final answer.
